# Golden tournament

> **Feature delivered — acceptance criteria.** Generated from the as-built BDD tests in
> `test/stories/golden_tournament_story_test.exs`. Every scenario below is an ExUnit test driving the
> real Codemojex game, so the catalogue cannot drift from the code.

**5 scenarios.**

## Scenario: the gather threshold arms the timer exactly once (ends_ms = room_deadline)

- **Given** a Golden Room (start_threshold 2) with one paid member, still gathering
- **When** the second (threshold-th) member buys in
- **Then** the game is :open, ends_ms equals room_deadline, and the counter went 1/2 → 2/2

## Scenario: the top-K split the diamond pool live — no reveal, one distribution

- **Given** a started Golden Room with two scored members and a known pool
- **When** the game is closed via the live-split path
- **Then** the whole pool drains to the top-K (dust to rank 1), a {:golden_win} fired, and NO {:revealed}

## Scenario: every member outside the top-K is paid a consolation clip (0 if never scored)

- **Given** a started Golden Room with three members; one outside the top-K, one who never guesses
- **When** the game closes (top_k = [100], so only rank 1 is in the split)
- **Then** bob (outside the top-1) got max_score/10 clips; carol (never scored) got 0

## Scenario: a never-fills Golden Room voids with NO refund

- **Given** a Golden Room with buy-ins below threshold, past its room_deadline
- **When** the void fires (and re-fires on a second tick)
- **Then** the game is :voided, the room reset, no refund TXN exists, and the balance did not rise

## Scenario: the sweep drives the timer-close and the void, both idempotent

- **Given** an :open game past its ends_ms and a :gathering game past its room_deadline
- **When** the sweep ticks (twice)
- **Then** the open game settled, the gathering game voided, and a second tick changed nothing
